query GetEngineeringTicketPlatformIntegrationsFromApiKey($apiKey: String!) {
      getEngineeringTicketPlatformIntegrationsFromApiKey(apiKey: $apiKey) {
        pushAutoIdentifiedIssues
        provider
        clientId
        defaultPriority
        defaultProject
        defaultTeam
        primaryCloudId
        installed
        projects
        teams
        workflowStates
        webhookState
        clouds
        labels
        sprints
        users
        fieldConfigurations
        invalidFields
        jiraReporterAccountId
      }
    }
